api_key.description: Finnhub API key. Sent only as the X-Finnhub-Token header; never logged.

base_url.description: Finnhub API base URL override for tests or proxies.

exchange.description: Exchange code for the stock_symbols stream (default US).

market_news_category.description: News category for the market_news stream (default general).

symbols.description: Comma-, whitespace-, or semicolon-separated stock ticker symbols to fan out over for the company_profile and stock_recommendations streams (one request per symbol). Required for those two streams only; stock_symbols/market_news do not reference it. company_news is not implemented in this bundle (see docs.md Known limits), so this key does not drive it here.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
